productDisplayName: Lakme Absolute Flutter Secrets Volumizing Mascara
description: WHAT IT IS? Lakme Absolute Flutter Secrets Volume Mascara not only adds volume to your beautiful lashes but also defines them and makes your eyes look bigger and more beautiful. WHAT IT DOES?Increases length and adds fantastic volume to your eyelashes with just one sweepIt multiples lash volume, to give you a clump-free lookFEATURESAdds volume to your beautiful eyesLash multiplying and volumizingOphthalmologically testedWaterproofsmudge-resistantEasy to use applicatorABOUT THE COLLECTIONAlways wanted naturally lush and dense eyelashes? Achieve them with Lakmé Absolute Flutter Secrets Volume Mascara and rule the world with voluminous lashes! It adds natural volume to your beautiful eyes, giving them a distinctive & romantic look.???????ABOUT THE BRANDLakme is India's No.1 color cosmetics brand offering a wide range of high-end, world-class color cosmetics and skincare products.
